articles.title_en: In some areas of Russia, barbecue cooking may be prohibited.
articles.lead_en: The ban may be temporarily introduced in the event of an increase in fire danger, the Russian Ministry of Emergency Situations emphasized.
articles.title_raw: На отдельных территориях России приготовление шашлыков могут запретить
articles.lead_raw: Запрет могут временно ввести в случае повышения пожарной опасности, подчеркнули в МЧС РФ

articles.title_en: Number of those injured in hard landing helicopter incident in Russia’s Usinsk rises to 10
articles.lead_en: Rosaviatsiya defined the accident as a crash

articles.title_en: 8 Trapped After Permafrost Thaw Triggers Coal Mine Collapse in Russia’s Far East
articles.lead_en: The CEO of the mining company that operates the site said the accident was likely caused by the thawing of a “lens” — a localized underground pocket of ice or unstable rock.
